reason: Procedural setup — user asks to install octowiki and init a wiki. The agent executes. Using Octowiki as the wiki system was already decided in the pipeline spec (seq 5). This pair is execution of that decision, not a new architectural signal.

provenance.raw_agent: It's installed at ~/.bun/bin/octowiki. Done. Wiki is scaffolded at wiki/pages/.
provenance.raw_user: We should install my project octowiki. It's probably available on this machine, we'd need to run its init to make a wiki in this dir
